# Resolution Options

Once a damage report is approved, you may choose one of two resolutions. Either receive a free replacement of the same item with shipping both ways covered by ACME Shop, or get a full refund, including the original shipping fee, back to the original payment method.

[Source: damaged_items.md#resolution-options]
